DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO FEB-27-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING REQUEST FOR AMISSIONS TO DEFENDANT ADMITTED, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: HEARING IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 10, 2020. ALL PARTIES SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR FILINGS WITH ROOM 301 IN COMPLIANCE WITH SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B AND A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2020 - GEORGE APOSHIAN, ESQ. APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. COUNSEL INDICATED TO THE COURT THAT HE WAS NOT READY FOR A PROVE-UP HEARING AS HE DOES NOT HAVE ACCESS TO HIS WITNESS UNTIL 2021. THE COURT SET A DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING ON OCT-26-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, BEFORE THE HONORABLE GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. THE COURT DENIED COUNSEL'S REQUEST TO HAVE HIS WITNESS ATTEND REMOTELY. THE COURT ORDERED ALL PARTIES PRESENT INCLUDING THE WITNESS, HOWEVER INDICATED TO COUNSEL THAT HE MAY INQUIRE WITH JUDGE SANDOVAL IF ANY REMOTE APPEARANCE FOR THE WITNESS & HIMSELF WOULD BE ALLOWED. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS (TRANSACTION ID # 100050619) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS TO DEFENDANT ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS TO DEFENDANT ADMITTED IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS DATED OCTOBER 24, 2019 ARE DEEMED ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL SERVE A COPY OF THIS ORDER ON DEFENDANT WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. A TRUE COPY OF THE REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SHALL BE ATTACHED TO THE ORDER AS AN EXHIBIT. THE MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING DIRECTLY TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Amissions To Defendant Admitted
Off Calendar Mar-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted.

Plaintiff's Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admissions To Defendant Admitted is unopposed and granted. Plaintiff's request for admissions dated October 24, 2019 are deemed admitted. Plaintiff shall serve a copy of this order on defendant with Notice of Entry. A true copy of the Request for Admissions shall be attached to the order as an exhibit.

The Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling directly to the Judge Pro Tem at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Request For Amissions To Defendant Admitted
Off Calendar Feb-27-2020 Continued To Mar-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S Motion For Order Deeming Request For Amissions To Defendant Admitted is continued to March 10, 2020. All parties shall immediately provide courtesy copies of their filings with room 301 in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B and a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
